files_touched.change: Tree.Insert (bootstrap root install) and propagate (root-split root install) now call SaveRoot automatically whenever they change t.root; errors from SaveRoot are wrapped and returned.
files_touched.risk: low — only two rare, already-serialized-under-rootMu call sites gain an extra fsync; ordinary (non-root-changing) inserts unaffected.

files_touched.change: Added TestCrashBetweenInsertAndSaveRootRecovers (exact name from issue's test spec).

files_not_touched_considered.reason: isValidRecordType's allow-list and Replay's dispatch already correctly handle RecordBTreeInsert/RecordBTreeDelete as valid-but-unwired types; no production writer of those record types exists, so no change needed here for this subtask's chosen fix path (SaveRoot automation, not WAL-replay wiring).
RecoverFromWAL's default-case no-op on non-catalog record types is intentional per its own doc comment and remains correct; not touched.

Issue's acceptance criteria and test spec name both scope this subtask to Insert only ("a crash between an Insert and the next SaveRoot"); Tree.Delete's own root-changing paths (if any) are a symmetric but explicitly out-of-scope follow-up, noted in handoff for the next subtasks / future issue.

downstream_consumers_checked: engine/split/execute.go (ExecuteSplitAtomic, ExecuteSplitBtreeInsert — both call tree.Insert; behavior unchanged except for the new automatic SaveRoot on root-changing inserts, which is strictly additive durability, not a behavior/signature change)
engine/mvcc (no direct btree.Tree.Insert call sites found)

unrelated_concurrent_changes_observed.note: git diff --stat at run start showed unrelated in-flight changes from other concurrently-running agents (engine/rpc/*, proto/hivemind.proto, agents/hivemind_pb2*.py, engine/catalog/record.go, engine/cmd/smokeserver/main.go, and an untracked engine/engine_stress_test.go with a package-name conflict against engine/integration_test.go). None overlap engine/btree or engine/wal. This subtask's git add/commit is scoped strictly to engine/btree/insert.go and engine/btree/btree_test.go.
